2605.06638.title: Can RL Teach Long-Horizon Reasoning to LLMs? Expressiveness Is Key
2605.06638.paper_summary: Reinforcement learning (RL) has been applied to improve large language model (LLM) reasoning, yet the systematic study of how training scales with task difficulty has been hampered by the lack of controlled, scalable environments. We introduce ScaleLogic, a synthetic logical reasoning framework that offers independent control over two axes of difficulty: the depth of the required proof planning (i.e., the horizon) and the expressiveness of the underlying logic. Our proposed framework supports a wide range of logics: from simple implication-only logic ("if-then") towards more expressive first-order reasoning with conjunction ("and"), disjunction ("or"), negation ("not"), and universal quantification ("for all"). Using this framework, we show that the RL training compute $T$ follows a power law with respect to reasoning depth $D$ ($T \propto D^γ$, $R^{2} > 0.99$), and that the scaling exponent $γ$ increases monotonically with logical expressiveness, from $1.04$ to $2.60$. On downstream mathematics and general reasoning benchmarks, more expressive training settings yield both larger performance gains (up to $+10.66$ points) and more compute-efficient transfer compared to less expressive settings, demonstrating that what a model is trained on, not just how much it is trained, shapes downstream transfer. We further show that the power-law relationship holds across multiple RL methods, and curriculum-based training substantially improves scaling efficiency.
2605.06638.paper_summary_zh: 強化學習（RL）已被應用於改善大型語言模型（LLM）的推理，然而，由於缺乏可控的、可擴展的環境，對於訓練如何隨任務難度而變化的系統性研究受到阻礙。我們介紹了 ScaleLogic，一個合成邏輯推理框架，提供對兩個難度軸的獨立控制：所需證明規劃的深度（即，地平線）和基礎邏輯的表達能力。我們提出的框架支持廣泛的邏輯：從簡單的僅含蘊涵的邏輯（"如果-那麼"）到更具表達力的第一階推理，包含合取（"和"）、析取（"或"）、否定（"不"）和全稱量化（"對所有"）。使用這個框架，我們顯示 RL 訓練計算 $T$ 隨著推理深度 $D$ 遵循冪律（$T \propto D^γ$，$R^{2} > 0.99$），而且縮放指數 $γ$ 隨著邏輯表達能力單調增加，從 $1.04$ 到 $2.60$。在下游數學和一般推理基準中，更具表達力的訓練設置相比於較少表達力的設置，產生了更大的性能提升（高達 $+10.66$ 分）和更具計算效率的轉移，顯示出模型訓練的內容，而不僅僅是訓練的量，塑造了下游轉移。我們進一步顯示，這一冪律關係在多種 RL 方法中成立，而基於課程的訓練顯著提高了縮放效率。
2605.06638.author: Tianle Wang et.al.
2605.06638.authors: Tianle Wang, Zhaoyang Wang, Guangchen Lan, Xinpeng Wei, Sipeng Zhang, Guanwen Qiu, Abulhair Saparov
